Step Description:
1. Login to the system
2. Navigate to "Roster Management" section
3. Click "Add New Roster" button
4. Enter valid roster details and save
Preconditions: User is on the "Roster Management" page
Expected Result: New roster should be saved and displayed in the list

Test Case Title: Duty Type should be selectable when creating an assignment
Step Description:
1. Navigate to "Roster Duty" section. 
2. Click on "Create Assignment" button. 
3. Verify "Duty Type" dropdown is populated with values. 
4. Select a valid "Duty Type".
5. Fill other required fields. 
6. Click "Save" button. 
7. Verify the "Duty Type" is correctly displayed in the roster list.
Step Data: User is logged in and on the "Roster Duty" page
Preconditions: "Duty Type" dropdown should be populated, the selected duty type should be saved successfully and displayed in the roster list.
Expected Result: Duty Type is selected, assignment saved successfully, and Duty Type displayed correctly.
Actual Result: Duty Type dropdown not selectable, no values are displayed as it was not created because of above issue

Test Case Title: Location field should be a selectable dropdown when creating an assignment
Step Description:
1. Navigate to "Roster Duty" section. 
2. Click on "Create Assignment" button. 
3. Verify "Location" field is displayed as a dropdown. 
4. Check if the "Location" dropdown is populated with available location values. 
5. Select a valid location from the dropdown. 
6. Fill other required fields. 
7. Verify the selected "Location" is saved and displayed correctly in the roster list.
Step Data: User is logged in and on the "Roster Duty" page
Expected Result: "Location" field should be a dropdown with available location values, and a valid location should be selectable.
Actual Result: Error: Location field is not a dropdown, it's a text field. Location cannot be selected.
